dod_provenance.note: Caller confirmed DoD 2026-06-21: generalized fixture-derived observables (no hard-coded values), execute generated CLI, all 3 MCP transports, +7 integration checks, real-component + APIGEN_LIVE e2e. Approved apply-all.

transition_log.note: Scaffolded 4 packages via nx g @nx/js:library with --projectNameAndRootFormat as-provided (required for Nx 18 to place projects at exact paths). Applied emptyOutDir:true to all 4 vite.config.ts files and dependsOn:["build","test"] to all 4 project.json nx-release-publish targets. Added all 4 @adhd/apigen-* paths to tsconfig.base.json with ./ prefix. Audit guard exit 0: 4/4 checks passed. All 5 acceptance criteria verified: [scaffold-packages.1] correct tags, [scaffold-packages.2] all 4 in nx show projects, [scaffold-packages.3] tsconfig paths present, [scaffold-packages.4] emptyOutDir in vite configs, [scaffold-packages.5] dependsOn in project.json. Commit SHA: 693fe3b.

Wrote packages/apigen/core/src/lib/types.ts (GeneratedSchemas, ComposedSchemas, ExportMode, GenerateSchemasOptions, PluginInput, PluginOutput, RunInput, OutputPlugin) and replaced index.ts with type-only re-exports plus generateSchemas/composeSchemas stubs. Guard: npx nx build apigen-core exited 0 (313ms). AC verified: [core-types.1] build exit 0; [core-types.2] typeof generateSchemas === function in CJS output; [core-types.3] stub throws "not implemented — see schema-extraction state"; [core-types.4] grep for @adhd/apigen-runtime|@adhd/apigen-plugin produced no output. Commit: c88cfcd.

Implemented pluginGenerator (generators/plugin/generator.ts + schema.json + 4 EJS __files__ templates) and generateExecutor (executors/generate/executor.ts + schema.json). Added generators.json, executors.json, updated package.json deps and vite.config.ts externals, rewrote src/index.ts. Templates use propertyName (camelCase) for JS identifiers, fileName (kebab) for string id/description fields. 13 tests pass (7 generator + 5 executor + 1 legacy). Guard npx nx build apigen-nx exits 0. Commit: 8ab11fa.

Implemented generateSchemas() with ts-morph (param-name extraction) + ts-json-schema-generator (JSON Schema). Created orchestrator generate-schemas.ts, three extractors (named/default/named-object), two schema builders (ts-json-schema + morph-fallback). Added ts-morph@23 + ts-json-schema-generator@2.3 to root package.json (yarn hoisted monorepo) and installed via yarn. Fixed hasQuestionToken detection for optional params on arrow-function call signatures. Added explicit @nx/vite:test target to project.json so --testFile alias resolves. All 8 acceptance criteria pass. Guard exit 0. Commits b0c6eac + 1719847.

Implemented composeSchemas() in packages/apigen/core/src/lib/compose-schemas.ts: pure function with SlimMiddleware interface, data-wrapper always present, false-only suppression via fnOverrides[mw.id] === false. 6 spec tests covering no-middleware, session middleware, false-override suppression, zero-param function, multiple middlewares, and null-does-not-suppress. index.ts stub replaced with export { composeSchemas } from ./lib/compose-schemas — throwing stub removed. Guard: nx test apigen-core exited 0, 6/6 passed. Commit: 1c8fc5a.
Foundation phase audit: 19/19 checks pass (rc=0, verified by orchestrator independently). Guard F14 fix applied (vitest positional). nx-generator product verified: nx test apigen-nx 13/13.

Implemented 5 lib files (types, define-middleware, event-bus, build-context, api-package) + 2 test files + updated index.ts. Added @nx/vite:test target to project.json. Guard: npx nx test apigen-runtime --testFile=packages/apigen/runtime/src/test/api-package.spec.ts → 8/8 passed (exit 0). All 6 acceptance criteria verified: session schema has session+data fields, assertNoSelfSubscription throws ConfigurationError, observer middleware receives start+complete events, strict=true throws on unknown override key, buildContext accumulates sequentially, no Node-only/plugin imports in src/.

Implemented needsEnvelopeField, dataParamNames, dispatch in packages/apigen/runtime/src/lib/dispatch.ts. All 8 tests pass (guard exit 0). Added additive export to index.ts: export { needsEnvelopeField, dataParamNames, dispatch } from ./lib/dispatch. Commit a87e5f7.
Runtime phase audit: 13/13 pass (rc=0, orchestrator-verified independently). dispatch single-path + no-plugin-import + no-node-builtins invariants green.

Generated 5 plugins via nx g @adhd/apigen-nx:plugin (jsonschema, mcp, api-fastify, api-express, cli). Added vite.config.ts+tsconfig files (generator template gap). Patched project.json test targets with outputs+configFile. Fixed broken index.ts__tmpl__ default re-export. Also patched generated index.ts files. All 5 stubs build. Guard 5/5 passed (exit 0). Commit 98dbc22.

Implemented generate() (emits routes.ts with POST /<id>/<fn>, imports dispatch from @adhd/apigen-runtime, no schema:{body} attachment) and run() (real Fastify in-process, abort-signal teardown). 9 vitest tests pass against real Fastify server: POST /test-pkg/getUser returns {id,name} matching direct function call. Added fastify@^4 to package.json; added resolutions:{estree-walker:2.0.2} to fix Nx vite-plugin-dts CJS compat broken by estree-walker@3 ESM-only hoisting. Guard (npx nx test apigen-plugin-api-fastify) exit 0.

Human checkpoint cleared: plan owner approved the plugin-api-fastify reference (9/9 unit tests, dispatch not inlined, no AJV body schema, OutputPlugin conformant) via RESUME directive; checkpoints/fastify-approved.md created.

Implemented generate() with path.join(pkg.id, fnName+.json) per function, pretty-print defaulting true, no run() method. 7/7 tests pass (emits correct paths, valid JSON, compact mode, interface shape, multi-fn, multi-pkg, pretty-print default). Guard: npx nx test apigen-plugin-jsonschema exit 0.
Renamed project apigen-plugin-cli→apigen-plugin-cli-output to match guard/slug/convention (scaffold mis-named it); 14 tests pass, build clean.

Implemented full MCP plugin: plugin.ts (delegates generate/run, optionsSchema with all 3 transport enums), generate.ts (emits index.ts + server.ts per transport), run.ts (in-process server; streaming-http creates transport per request to avoid single-use limitation), templates/server-stdio.tpl.ts + server-http.tpl.ts. Guard: npx nx test apigen-plugin-mcp — 21/21 tests pass (3 spec files). tools/list verified via real StreamableHTTPServerTransport HTTP call returning SSE with correct tool names; callTool(getUser) verified against ground-truth direct call; callTool(listUsers) verified; abort signal closes server. All 3 transport values in optionsSchema enum. dispatch imported from @adhd/apigen-runtime, not inlined. No dep added (SDK already present at 1.29.0). Commit: daca7b5.

Implemented generate.ts (Router + res.json route emission), run.ts (real Express app, abort via server.close), plugin.ts (wired generate/run, full optionsSchema). Added express + @types/express + supertest via yarn (no package-lock.json). 10 tests pass: generate emits Router+dispatch import, routes use router.post+res.json not return, run() serves real HTTP POST via fetch integration tests. dispatch imported from @adhd/apigen-runtime — never inlined. Commit f0e7002.

Plugins phase audit 19/19 (rc=0, orchestrator-verified). Fixed 2 real mcp build bugs the nx-test guard missed: TS2769 abort-listener (run.ts), and vite browser-externalization of node:crypto (externalized node builtins + mcp-sdk). All 5 plugins build+test.

test=0 lint=0 build=0. Implemented pipeline.ts (generateSchemas+composeSchemas wrapper), registry.ts (discoverPackages filesystem walk), commands/generate.ts (--source/--type/--out-dir/--export/--opt), commands/generate-registry.ts (--packages-dir/--tag/--exclude-tag). Updated src/index.ts wiring all 5 plugins. Added test fixtures api.ts + registry/pkg-a + pkg-b with __samples__. 10 tests pass covering all 5 AC. vite.config.ts externalized node builtins + plugin deps for platform:node build. .eslintrc.json fixture override added. package.json: commander ^14.0.3, dropped unused apigen-runtime dep. Explicit @nx/vite:test target added to project.json. Commit SHA: 81b4e2c.

Implemented run.ts + run-registry.ts commands. run: dynamic import() of source module, filters non-function exports (excl __samples__), wires AbortController to SIGINT/SIGTERM, calls plugin.run(). run-registry: discoverPackages() multi-pkg, imports live fns per pkg, single plugin.run() call with full packages array. index.ts updated to register both. Test: 5/5 pass (rc=0) — covers no-run-method error, live fns import, __samples__ exclusion, abort resolution, --output flag absent, multi-pkg registry dispatch, live streaming-http MCP server round-trip via process.emit(SIGINT). Lint: rc=0. Build: rc=0. Commit: 6571b98.

amendment_log.reason: Supersede v1 TS-only verification tail with the v2 canonical standard (docs/apigen/SPEC.md): code-first descriptor, name-by-exported-symbol extractor (fixes F28/F29), Layer harness + central validation, metadata envelope, plugin capabilities (target/layer/mount/envelope), package restructure (common vs per-language), unified adhd-apigen CLI + sidecar gateway, re-authored integration/DoD against the canonical contract.
